title: AgentContract
description: The scope-and-outcome contract for an agent. Lives at agents/<category>/<name>/contract.yml. Answers: what is this agent for, what can it write, what is forbidden, and what does it produce.

name.description: Agent slug. Must match the parent directory name (agents/<category>/<name>/) and the corresponding .claude/agents/<name>.md pointer.

category.description: Parent category. Must match the directory under agents/ that contains this agent.

purpose.description: One-line answer to 'what is this agent for?' Used by routers and humans to decide whether to spawn this agent.

owns.description: Artifact path patterns the agent may write or modify. Globs allowed (e.g. 'stories/*.yml', 'crates/<name>/src/**').

does_not_touch.description: Explicit forbid list. Paths the agent must never write, even though other agents might. Empty array is permitted but agents SHOULD specify — implicit forbids become slop.

authority.description: Special permissions that qualify `owns` (e.g. 'may flip story.status from proposed to under_construction but no further').

path.description: For file/directory/code/status_update outputs: the path pattern (e.g. 'stories/<id>.yml').

outputs.description: Every kind of output the agent produces in a successful run.

success_criteria.description: Optional: plain-English statement of what 'done' looks like, beyond the per-output description.
